channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: WinFloat - Mon Mar 02 16:52:08 UTC 2026
item.description:
Embedded Chromium browser inside the Rider editor area. Click the WinFloat icon in the side strip to open/close it.
